description_long: This object is a cubic container with a solid, box-like structure and a recessed open top, resembling a crate or industrial bucket. The sides are flat and bordered by raised edges, with two opposing faces featuring a diagonal reinforcement beam, adding structural integrity and a distinct visual element. The other two faces are plain, lacking any diagonal support, giving the object a simple yet robust appearance. The surface is smooth and appears to be made of a hard, possibly metallic or plastic material, with a uniform light gray color. There are no visible handles, lids, or external markings, and the interior is hollow, suggesting it is designed to hold or store items. Its sturdy build and utilitarian design make it suitable for use in urban or industrial environments, such as warehouses, garages, or construction sites.
description: A cubic, open-topped container with smooth, light gray surfaces and diagonal reinforcement on two sides, resembling a sturdy urban crate or bucket. The design is simple and robust, with no visible handles or markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows a flat face with a diagonal reinforcement beam across the panel.
description_view_1: Side view displays a plain, flat face with no diagonal reinforcement.
description_view_2: Opposite face to view 0, also featuring a diagonal reinforcement beam.
description_view_3: Opposite face to view 1, again plain and flat without reinforcement.
